title: Ladenbergia acutifolia

The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Ladenbergia acutifolia is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is also known by other names. The exact classification of Ladenbergia acutifolia is further detailed in the APG III system, where it is placed in the order Gentianales.
